name: Hoax.ai Non-Public Static Workbench Prototype Visual Identity Contract
background_identity_rules: background must be conceptual layer, not decoration
background must not default to black cyber UI
background may use pale document field, bone neutral, warm ash, muted graphite, faint blue-grey provenance lines, restrained amber/copper boundary accents
background may represent missing context as absence
background may represent provenance gap as shadow
background may represent artifact-subject boundary as rail
background may represent output boundary as containment
non_authorization_statement: This visual identity contract governs future prototype exploration only. It does not authorize prototype files, CSS implementation in Sprint 33, or operational interface behavior.
